description: Per-vector conformance expectations for the TSP License Artifact v1 suite (ADR-0010). SEPARATE from the v3.0 TrustEnvelope suite (expectations.json) and its SHA256SUMS — a license is a sibling artifact and is never mixed into the envelope vectors. Reasons match verify_license()'s closed vocabulary. The pinned root is fixtures/license-v1/license-root-key.json; `now` is the verifier clock per vector; `origin` is the gateway's configured trust-manifest origin; `requiredModules` is what the gated feature demands (default-deny).

vectors.note: Reference good license: license -> issuer -> pinned root all verify offline.
Per-origin binding: a configured origin outside subject origin(s) fails closed.
Default-deny per feature: an unlicensed module fails closed.
Hard expiry: past validUntil with no signed grace fails closed.
Issuer window checked before license window: an expired issuer credential fails closed first.
Signed-only grace: past validUntil but inside graceUntil verifies, flagged in_grace.
Past graceUntil fails closed; the verifier never invents grace.
License body mutated after issuer signing.
Issuer credential references a root not in the pinned set.
Issuer credential body mutated after root signing.
license.issuer_id does not match credential.issuer_id though both signatures are valid.
Closed allowlist rejects an injected unknown field before any signature work.
